states.name: Oumei
states.title: Spirit of Spring
states.description:
I have heard many outlandish tales in my travels. In the Majas Desert, for example, the locals tell of a hidden grove where grows a tree that blooms only once every twenty years. What's more, the spirit of this tree is said to be a woman of surpassing beauty who will grant any wish made to her. A fabrication, to be sure, but a fascinating one.
(From the Chronicles of Erden, Eastland Chapter)

states.name: Oumei
states.title: Spirit of Spring
states.description: I am Oumei, the spirit of the sakura. After so many years inside my tree, I've decided to finally set forth on a journey. The outside world is so vast, and every day brings new surprises, but... Oh, dear. I'm still so sleepy...

states.name: Oumei
states.title: Spirit of Spring
states.description: As pleasant as my long naps are, I do grow terribly bored and lonely. And one never knows what might happen while I sleep. I hope this journey will help me find ways to protect my tree, even while I slumber. But...speaking of naps...
